tools.name: artistally_search_conventions
tools.description: Search fan conventions (furry, anime, gaming) across 51 US and Canadian metro areas. Filter by text, community, region, state, metro, or date range. Returns dates, venue, location, registration windows and table costs, plus a canonical ArtistAlly URL per convention.

tools.name: artistally_get_convention
tools.description: Full profile of one convention by slug: dates, venue and address, website, artist-alley and vendor registration windows/costs/URLs, portfolio and table-share policy, hotel block, transit access, organizer verification, and up to 6 years of attendance/pricing history. Get slugs from artistally_search

tools.name: artistally_list_open_registrations
tools.description: Artist-alley and vendor/dealer registration windows that are open right now or opening soon, sorted by urgency (soonest close date first). The go-to tool for questions like "which cons can I still apply to?" or "what artist alleys open this month?".

tools.name: artistally_get_coverage
tools.description: The regions, states/provinces, and metro areas ArtistAlly tracks, with approved-convention counts. Use it to learn valid region/state/metro filter values for the other tools. Takes no arguments.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: artistally_search_conventions, artistally_get_convention · Public sink: artistally_get_convention.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: artistally_search_conventions, artistally_get_convention · Public sink: artistally_get_convention

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
